binary.justification: Use this when the dependent variable has only two outcomes, such as yes/no or 0/1.

count.justification: Use this for non-negative counts when events are relatively rare and the mean and variance are similar.

continuous_normal.justification: Use this when the dependent variable is continuous and roughly symmetric.

continuous_skewed.justification: Use this when the dependent variable is continuous but skewed; OLS is a practical starting point.

censored.justification: Use this when the dependent variable is censored at a lower or upper bound.

panel.justification: Panel data is not yet supported in this StatBuddy scaffold.

survival.justification: Survival analysis is not yet supported in this StatBuddy scaffold.
